headline: 4 Ethereum governance/admin addresses confirmed via DeFiPunkd API; deployment documentation inaccessible; cross-chain enumeration incomplete due to fetch limits
short_headline: 4 Ethereum addresses confirmed; multi-chain discovery blocked

findings.text: Block-explorer name-tag search: Ethereum addresses 0xE478de485ad2fe566d49342Cbd03E49ed7DB3356, 0xBCfF8B0b9419b9A88c44546519b1e909cF330399, 0x40907540d8a6C65c637785e8f8B742ae6b0b9968, 0x467947EE34aF926cF1DCac093870f613C96B1E0c pre-loaded in addressBook and verified via DeFiPunkd surfacer. No independent block-explorer search completed.

Official deployments doc: Curve technical docs URLs for deployed contracts and reference addresses are inaccessible (site down or permissions). GitHub repo https://github.com/curvefi/curve-contract identified as primary source repo but not fetched for deployment artifacts.

Audit PDFs: Audit page https://docs.curve.finance/references/audits/ identified. Search results confirm Trail of Bits, MixBytes, Quantstamp, and ChainSecurity as auditors; dates range from January 2020 through September 2024. Scope and contract details require direct PDF fetch (not completed).
GitHub deployment artifacts: Curve contract repo identified but not walked. Foundry broadcast/ and hardhat-deploy/ structures not inspected; deployment JSONs not extracted.

Multi-chain enumeration: Curve operates on 30 chains per protocol context. Only Ethereum addresses verified via prefetched surfacers. Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, and 24 other chains require independent D1–D4 enumeration — not completed due to fetch quota exhaustion.

Factory-discovered children: StableSwap Registry, StableSwap Factory, CryptoSwap Registry, CryptoSwap Factory, pool registry identified in search results; enumeration view methods not called via read API.

Role taxonomy: 4 pre-loaded addresses use roles: 'DAO Voting (Ownership)', 'DAO Voting (Parameter)', 'Curve DAO Ownership Agent', 'Emergency DAO multisig'. Roles conform to vocab with multisig/governance/owner actor classes. No new role-based discovery completed.
Ratchet output integrity: All 4 addresses in admin_addresses[] trace to DeFiPunkd surfacer fetch (evidence entry D1). No snippet-only sightings to demote to unknowns[].

rationale.verdict: Discovery slice cannot be completed to full width. Ethereum governance/admin surface confirmed via DeFiPunkd API (4 addresses, roles pre-specified). Official deployment documentation (readthedocs, docs.curve.finance) inaccessible. GitHub artifacts not inspected. Cross-chain addresses for Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, Optimism, Avalanche, and 24 other chains not enumerated. Audit PDFs not fetched for scope details. Factory child enumeration not performed. Grade=unknown because multi-chain scope is materially incomplete.

evidence.shows: AppProxyUpgradeable proxy for Aragon Voting app (DAO Voting Ownership). Proxies to 0xa4D1a2693589840BABb7f3A44D14Fdf41b3bF1Fe. Kernel at 0xad06868167BC5Ac5cFcbEf2CAFa82bc76961D72d. Token (voting) at 0x5f3b5DfEb7B28CDbD7FAba78963EE202a494e2A2 (CRV). EVMScript registry at 0x1b13e8E7b85b2F92CA4436F98F88CE169f63D567. Parameters: minAcceptQuorumPct=30%, supportRequiredPct=51%, voteTime=604800 (7 days).

Curve protocol primary source code repository. Contains contract pools, pool-templates, deployment scripts (scripts/deploy.py), and README references to deployment addresses. Not walked for specific deployment artifacts or commit SHAs in this run.

Audits page lists auditors: Trail of Bits (2020-01-31, 2020-07-10), MixBytes (2020-07-13, 2020-07-22, 2023-06-05), Quantstamp (2020-08-05, 2020-10-15), ChainSecurity (2021-09-25, 2021-09-27, 2022-01-04, 2023-06-23, 2023-12-12, 2024-01-24, 2024-09-25, and more). All audits and security disclosures hosted on security-incident-reports GitHub repo. Page inaccessible for full PDF links and scope details.

Canonical deployed contracts reference. Expected to contain per-chain Aragon DAO, factory, burner, registry, and gauge deployment addresses. Page inaccessible; information sourced from search results only.

Deployment addresses for Ethereum mainnet, Arbitrum, Aurora, Avalanche, Fantom, Harmony, Moonbeam, Polygon, XDai and others. Includes factory metapools, zap contracts, DAO contracts, and burners. Page inaccessible; verified from search result snippet only.

unknowns: D1: Arbitrum, Base, Monad, Fraxtal, Etherlink, Polygon, Plasma, Avalanche, X Layer, xDai, TAC, Optimism, XDC, Hyperliquid L1, Kava, Binance, Unichain, Ink, Taiko, Celo, Plume Mainnet, Sonic, Aurora, Moonbeam, Fantom, Corn, Stable, Mantle, Harmony — independent block-explorer name-tag searches not completed; discovery depends on accessible deployment docs.
D2-offchain: Official deployments doc (readthedocs.io, docs.curve.finance) inaccessible; cannot extract roles, addresses, or per-chain index
D3-offchain: Audit PDFs not fetched; scope, contract names, and addresses per audit not extracted
D4-offchain: GitHub deployment artifacts not walked; Foundry broadcast/ and hardhat-deploy/ structures not inspected; commit SHAs not pinned
D5: Cross-chain enumeration incomplete for 29 non-Ethereum chains
D6: Factory enumeration (allPools, getPool view methods) not executed via read API; cap at 50 children per factory not applied

admin_addresses.role: Curve DAO Ownership Agent — Aragon Agent

protocol_metadata.about: Curve is a decentralized exchange (DEX) optimized for stablecoin and low-slippage trading using an automated market maker (AMM) model. The protocol features token-weighted governance via vote-escrowed CRV (veCRV), with CRV holders earning 50% of protocol fees and boosting LP rewards up to 2.5x. Curve operates across 30 blockchains with multiple pool types (StableSwap, CryptoSwap) and a proprietary lending system (crvUSD). After a July 2023 Vyper compiler exploit, the protocol strengthened security and maintains ongoing audits.
